chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI C. P.No.D-5858 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) Disposed of matter: For hearing of CMA No.9018/2023. 23.09.2025 Mr. Shahrukh Farogh Naseem, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Imtiaz Ali Solangi, Advocate for the Respondents. Ms. Rabia Khalid, Asstt. Attorney General. ********** As per Nazir report dated 15.04.2023, the post-dated cheque earlier given by the petitioner was for 10% of the tax encashed out of which 4% has been paid to the FBR/Commissioner Inland Revenue, MTO, Enforcement-I, Karachi, whereas the remaining 6% amount lies with the Nazir. The prayer of the petitioner is to substitute said cash with a cheque. Learned counsel for the respondents has extended his no objection to that. Therefore, Nazir shall release the cash to the petitioner in lieu of cheque for the same amount. In the event the matter is not decided in the Supreme Court before six months, the petitioner shall substitute the cheque with the fresh cheque. JUDGE JUDGE NADEEM
